name: Classic Beef and Barley
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds ground beef/or diced stew meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef, onion, and garlic in a Dutch oven or heavy kettle until the meat is no longer pink.
2. Add barley and remaining ingredients (except croutons) to the pot. Cover and cook on low heat for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
3. Serve with garnish of toasted Parmesan croutons and additional minced parsley. Makes 6-8 servings.
To toast croutons:
1. Drizzle croutons with melted butter or margarine.
2. Toss with grated Parmesan cheese.
3. Spread on a baking sheet and toast in an oven preheated to 400°F until golden.
